scripts.dev: node scripts/ensure-port.js && nodemon --config nodemon.json --exec "node -r dotenv/config src/index.js dotenv_config_path=.env.local"
scripts.dev:server: node scripts/ensure-port.js && nodemon --config nodemon.json --exec "node -r dotenv/config src/index.js dotenv_config_path=.env.local"
